title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 315.077 - Laws to be posted, where
text:
315.077.  Laws to be posted, where. — An owner or operator of a hotel shall post a copy of sections 315.067 to 315.079, in addition to any rules established by the owner or operator of the hotel, in a conspicuous place at or near the guest registration desk and in each room of the hotel.
(L. 1998 S.B. 526)
